rules.Adjusted Tactics: During Deployment, after you have seen the Army Roster your opponent is bringing, this model may swap its current weapon(s) for legal weapon options equal to or less than the current point costs. For example, a Tactical Marine may swap its Plasma Gun for a Flamer because it costs less points.
rules.Authority of the Inquisition: 6" Aura, this model and target unit automatically pass Ld Tests.
rules.By Order of the Inquisition: This model may be taken as an Lord of War Choice in any Adeptus Mechanicus, Custode, Grey Knights, Imperial Guard, Imperial Knights, Sisters of Battle, Space Marines, or Squat Army.
rules.Bolter Discipline: This model always counts as being in half range when firing Rapid Fire weapons that have Bolter as long as it did not Move or does not count as Moving during your Movement Phase.
rules.Condemnor: This weapon gains Sniper (3+), but only if it targets a Psychic Mastery Level # model. Faith # - A unit with one or more Faith # may reroll 1 die per phase (both friend and foe). These dice can be spent on the unit as a whole, or an individual model that is part of the unit as you see fit. We recommend tracking this with tokens. The following instances can be used for the reroll, but remember that no matter what, a reroll of any kind CANNOT be rerolled again: • Saves • Feel No Pains • To Hit • To Wound or Penetrate • Ld Tests
rules.Grey Knight Spells: Due to redundancy, this list is placed here to avoid wasting large amounts of space. Spell +10 Purge Soul This unit or model rolls 1d6+Ld, points Cast 5+ and target enemy unit rolls 1d6+Ld. For each point higher this unit or model scored, the target suffers an Autowound with no Cover Saves. Spell +15 Astral Aim Attacks from target unit Ignore points Cast 5+ Cover until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +15 Gate of Infinity Target friendly unit is removed points Cast 6+ from the table and immediately performs a Deepstrike. Spell +18 Vortex of Doom 12 4+ Assault 1, 5" Blast, points Cast 8+ Monsterbane. Spell +20 Sanctuary Target unit gains a 5+ points Cast 6+ Invulnerability or a +1 to an existing Invulnerability (Maximum of 4+) until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +30 Hammerhand Target unit gains +1 To Wound points Cast 6+ in Melee until your next Psychic Phase.
rules.Inquisitor Spell List: Due to redundancy, this list is placed here to avoid wasting large amounts of space. Spell +5 points Terrify Target unit must take a Fear Cast 5+ Test. Spell +5 points Psychic Pursuit Target model cannot benefit Cast 6+ from Bodyguard or other ability for it to divert Wounds until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +10 Mental Target non-Titanic unit suffers points Interrogation 1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +10 Psychic Fortitude 18 Target unit automatically points Cast 6+ passes Ld Tests until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +10 Warding Target unit gains a 5+ points Incantation Invulnerability Save until your Cast 6+ next Psychic Phase. Spell +15 Domination The Cast Value is the target points Cast W+ non-Titanic model's remaining Wounds. This model immediately performs its Melee or Ranged attacks against one of its friendly units, but not itself.
rules.Know No Fear: This unit automatically passes Pinning Tests, Rally Tests, and Fear Tests. They still will fall back if they lose Combat Resolution.
rules.Lone Operative: This model cannot be targeted by weapons further than 12" away. This model cannot be targeted with Auras or True Auras. This model cannot join any unit. This model has a 3+ Invulnerability Save. Martyrdom # - If this model is slain, a target friendly unit within 6" gains # Martyrdom Tokens, which act like Faith Tokens. This Token does not replenish like those granted from Faith. Remember that all declared attacks from a unit are simultaneous (or all attacks in Melee at the same Initiative), so these Martyrdom Dice cannot be used until after those attacks are resolved. This friendly unit does not have to be part of your army.
rules.Quarry: During Deployment choose one enemy model. This model may reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls against this model.
rules.Requisition Approved: This model may be taken as an HQ Choice in any Adeptus Mechanicus, Custode, Grey Knights, Imperial Guard, Imperial Knights, Sisters of Battle, Space Marines, or Squat Army.
rules.Tactical Squads: Each unit with this rule may declare they are forming their own units during your Command Phase. They may split up as low as two models per unit. Units must be placed within Unit Coherency during Deployment. They may instead merge back into bigger units but may not exceed maximum unit size or merge with units other than their own unit name. If they do so, all suffered Wounds stack onto the most wounded models in the form of Mortal Wounds. If there are more to stack then remaining Wounds on a model, nominate another model to suffer these remaining Mortal Wounds. Independent Characters can never pass on Wounds or take on Wounds for a unit in this fashion.
rules.Wrist Mount: This weapon can be fired in Melee as if this model was a Monstrous Infantry and this model may still Declare Charges after firing it as if they had fired Assault Weapons.

rules.Chaff Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
rules.Chaff Launcher: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
rules.Dozerblade: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Move through Cover.
rules.Extra Armour: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.
rules.Forcefield: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Laud Hailer: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain Ld+1.
rules.Recovery Gear: Once per Round, Roll d6. On 5+ repair Immobilized or Crew Stun result.
rules.Searchlight: This unit and target unit are no longer affected by Night rules.

rules.Smoke Launcher: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to
rules.Vox Caster: This model and its unit gains Objective Secured. Inquisitor Greyfax Greyfax
rules.Seek Out Corruption: once per Round when a friendly Infantry unit fails a Ld test within 6", you MUST remove the highest Ld model from that unit from the game. Ignore Commissars and Lord Commissars for highest Ld purposes. The unit automatically passes the Ld test. Order Tests do not count for this rule.
rules.Telepath: Models must reroll successful To Hit rolls against this model in a Challenge.
rules.The Hour is Nigh: When the weapon is fired, place a marker on field at a valid target. In your next Command Phase, the barrage strikes! Scatter like normal, following the 15" Blast radius rules.
rules.T Minus 5: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. If the weapon is marked on the field and the carrier is destroyed, the Orbital Strike still hits in your Command Phase.
rules.Heretical Hunter: At the at the end of the Deployment Phase, place his Servo Skull next to an enemy unit, even if it is in Reserves. A unit marked by the Servo Skull suffers Ld-3 and must reroll all successful Ld Tests.
rules.Vox Uploader: If his model is on an Objective Marker, it can instead be treated as Contesting or Holding any other Objective Marker. Special Wargear:
rules.By Any Means Necessary: This model may place its Orbital Strike Token on friendly units. The Orbital Strike will never Scatter if you do so. If the model is slain, it hits the place it was standing when it was removed from the game.
rules.Throne of Judgement: This model is immune to the secondary effects of 1-4 on the Vehicle Damage Chart, but still suffers the extra Wounds.

wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.
wargear.Chaff Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
wargear.Dozerblade: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Move through Cover.
wargear.Extra Armour: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.
wargear.Forcefield: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Laud Hailer: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain Ld+1.
wargear.Recovery Gear: Once per Round, Roll d6. On 5+ repair Immobilized or Crew Stun result.
wargear.Searchlight: This unit and target unit are no longer affected by Night rules.
wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.
wargear.Vox Caster: This model and its unit gains Objective Secured. Ordos The Inquisition consists of many focuses and studies. Some specialize in extermination of the xenos filth that plague humanity. Others are binding Daemons. Many others exist as well, but most will fall under one of the following. If you wish to use units as presented exactly in the Codex, use the Minor Ordo to create your army. All models in your army MUST be from the same Ordo. Ordo Hereticus: -   Witch Hunters: All model's weapons in your army gain Sniper (4+) against Psychic Mastery Level # models.

options.description: May take up to one Inquisitor Spell for each Psychic Mastery Level
